deactivate.title: Deactivate {name}?
deactivate.subtitle: The user will no longer be able to access the platform until reactivated.

activate.title: Reactivate {name}?
activate.subtitle: The user will regain access to the platform.

feature.title: Feature {name}?
feature.subtitle: This trainer will appear in the platform featured carousel.

unfeature.title: Remove feature from {name}?
unfeature.subtitle: This trainer will no longer appear in the featured carousel.

impersonate.title: Access as {name}?
impersonate.subtitle: You will see the platform as this user. Use the top banner to return to your admin account.

delete.title: Permanently delete {name}?
delete.subtitle: This action is irreversible. All user data will be removed from the system.
